nasb.text: you yourselves know the thing which took place throughout all Judea, starting from Galilee, after the baptism which John proclaimed.

esv.text: you yourselves know what happened throughout all Judea, beginning from Galilee after the baptism that John proclaimed:

cnv.text: 你們知道：在約翰傳講洗禮之後，這道從加利利傳遍了猶太，

ccb.text: 你们都知道，自从约翰宣讲洗礼以来，从加利利开始，整个犹太地区发生了什么事。

csbs.text: 你们知道在约翰所传讲的洗礼以后，那从加利利开始，在犹太全地所发生的事，
